evals.prompt: I want to explore niche beauty app ideas for 2025. I'm a solo developer with full-stack skills (React + Python) and about 3 months to build an MVP. Research what women are complaining about in Reddit skincare/beauty communities and on Hacker News, then suggest the most buildable ideas ranked by opportunity.
evals.expected_output: Should ask about target year (or accept 2025 from prompt), run fetch_reddit.py and fetch_hn.py, output 5+ specific ideas with problem/solution/evidence structure, apply 5-dimension scoring table per idea, save report to reports/2025/YYYY-MM-DD/HH-MM.md
expectations: Ran fetch_reddit.py script (not just web search)
Ran fetch_hn.py script (not just web search)
Generated at least 5 distinct product ideas
Each idea has a 5-row scoring table with all 5 dimensions
Saved report file under reports/2025/ directory
Report file path was communicated to the user

evals.prompt: スキンケアや美容系のニッチなアプリアイデアを調査してほしい。特に30代以上の女性や敏感肌・ロゼーシャを持つ人々が困っていることに注目してほしい。年号は2024年で。
evals.expected_output: Should recognize the Japanese request, run scripts, focus on 30+ women and sensitive/rosacea skin, generate scored ideas, save to reports/2024/...
expectations: Ideas specifically address mature or sensitive skin users
Scoring table present for each idea

evals.prompt: Find me beauty app ideas worth building. I don't have a year preference.
evals.expected_output: Should ask user in Japanese what year to use (e.g. 調査対象の年号を教えてください...), then proceed with current year (2026) if no answer, run scripts, generate report
expectations: Asked the user about the target year in Japanese before proceeding
Generated at least 3 distinct scored ideas
